c20010847b.text: Zu jedem Floß gehörten zwei Flößer, einer stand vorn mit der Schiebestange, einer, der für Floß und Fahrt verantwortliche Floßmeister, hinten am Steuer.
c20010847b.translation: Two boatmen belonged to each raft, one stood at the front with the push pole, and the other, the raft master responsible for the raft and the journey, was at the stern.

c20100fedc.text: In unserer Familie wird selten ferngesehen.
c20100fedc.translation: In our family, television is rarely watched.

c202506f7e.text: An der Schleife der Schürze von Dirndlkleidern erkennt man angeblich den ehelichen Status der Trägerin.
c202506f7e.translation: The bow of the apron on dirndl dresses supposedly indicates the marital status of the wearer.

c202c96b7a.text: Pascal hat seine Hausaufgaben a tempo gemacht.

c202ee49a2.translation: Actual agreement remains effective even if unforeseen tax consequences arise for the parties involved.

c202fe08b6.text: „Die weiße Schale und das Gelb glitten abwärts. Noch ein Ei klatschte an die Fassade […].“
c202fe08b6.translation: The white shell and the yellow slid downward. Another egg splattered against the façade […].

c20443da21.translation: She could not have confirmed my suspicion more clearly: that the alleged niece was her daughter and I was her uncle.

c20473afe7.translation: That was a famous appeal by Jinnah: "Now that Pakistan has been created, we will be Hindus, Muslims, and Sikhs in our own four walls. In public, we are Pakistani citizens. Religion is a private matter that we follow at home."

c2080e5ab0.translation: Only the red corundums are called rubies.

c208575491.translation: Aren't you listening? Someone is calling, and it's meant for you!

c20a340998.translation: Documentaries, reports, magazine features, and an investigative television film drew attention to groundwater scarcity in Germany.

c20b1f4dff.translation: The withdrawal of war to an internal, often ethnic level has consequences for the handling of armed conflicts according to SIPRI.

c20d5487b6.translation: I can't see a regular pattern on this wallpaper; it seems to have been printed using a random generator.

c2110cd540.translation: The touch of the tip of her tongue shot through her like an electric shock.

c2120189d2.translation: The liberation of the Mustangs from the hands of the horse thieves is a matter of life and death.

c212f1aa34.translation: Then she can finally afford an apartment where she can store her books.

c21380c2f3.text: „Zwar hat die Internationalisierung der Lebensstile auch Spanien voll erfaßt, doch die ungebrochene Existenz des baskischen, katalanischen oder galizischen Nationalismus, die sich auf zum Teil antike, in jedem Falle aber auf mittelalterliche Ursprünge zurückführen lassen, belegen die Persistenz lokaler und regionaler Identitäten …“
c21380c2f3.translation: "Although the internationalization of lifestyles has fully reached Spain, the unbroken existence of Basque, Catalan, or Galician nationalism, which can be traced back to partly ancient, but in any case medieval origins, attests to the persistence of local and regional identities …"

c213dcda73.text: Die Kettensäge wird mit biologisch abbaubarem Öl geschmiert.
c213dcda73.translation: The chainsaw is lubricated with biodegradable oil.

c214da4ea7.text: Die neuen Häuser wurden am Stadtrand konzentriert, man wollte der Zersiedelung und einem großen Flächenverbrauch entgegenwirken.
c214da4ea7.translation: The new houses were concentrated on the outskirts of the city; the aim was to counteract urban sprawl and excessive land consumption.

c215f2f1c0.text: „Nach H. Kropf muss der Jäger darauf achten, wann das Schalenwild am Morgen ‚zu Holze zieht‘.“
c215f2f1c0.translation: According to H. Kropf, the hunter must pay attention to when the game leaves the forest in the morning.

c216a197e2.translation: After the Dayton peace agreement (which basically legitimized ethnic cleansing), Milošević also lost support within his own ranks and was eventually even called a traitor to Serbian interests by his critics — and was ultimately abandoned.

c21835af65.translation: The future Minister-President Winfried Kretschmann (Green Party) attracted a large audience in Konstanz on Thursday evening.

c219fd274f.translation: The encounter with Victor Gsovsky, ballet master and dancer, turned out to be a decisive meeting.

c21a66f70b.text: Abends gehe immer ich mit dem Hund raus, es ist so schön, noch mal frische Luft zu schnappen, bevor ich schlafengehe.
c21a66f70b.translation: In the evenings, I always go out with the dog; it's so nice to get some fresh air once more before I go to sleep.

c21b1a8c0d.text: Im Oberteil des Gebäudes befinden sich die Büros.
c21b1a8c0d.translation: The offices are located in the upper part of the building.

c21b54e836.translation: "According to regime opponents, army troops attacked the million-strong city with combat helicopters."

c21c5a8e0f.translation: Would you please accept my sincere thanks for your statement about my plan?

c21cd112b8.text: „Die deutsche Luftwaffe greift die italienische Schlachtflotte an, die den Waffenstillstandsbedingungen mit den Alliierten gemäß von La Spezia nach Malta ausgelaufen ist, und versenkt das Schlachtschiff "Roma".“
c21cd112b8.translation: "The German Luftwaffe attacks the Italian battle fleet, which, in accordance with the armistice conditions with the Allies, has sailed from La Spezia to Malta, and sinks the battleship 'Roma'."

c21d57bdd6.translation: The wooden table is first deburred and then its corners are rounded.

c21d95c887.translation: He handed over the staff to his successor.

c21eb637ce.translation: He has a lot of money.

c221193f68.translation: "Curiously, gentlemen in tuxedos and ladies with the most precious mink stoles observed this strange winner, who sobbed with every win."

c221d37fa7.text: Der Pinsel hätte gestern mehr als eine Ohrfeige verdient. (frei nach Lessing)
c221d37fa7.translation: The brush would have deserved more than a slap yesterday. (loosely based on Lessing)

c22302465a.translation: "That also teaches self-control, she said with a shrug, and that the course had probably been punishment enough for Milena."

c2234ce4e1.translation: We'll show them where the frog's curls are!

c223961c2d.translation: I persistently resisted Don Antonio's urging, who offered me the most honorable positions in various noble houses, where I was supposed to lead the training of the firstborn offspring of the family.

c223bc02b1.text: „Wer Europas Werte leben und verteidigen will, darf dem Unwohlsein nicht nachgeben, das der medial verbreitete Terror einzelner Fanatiker hervorruft.“
c223bc02b1.translation: Whoever wants to live by and defend Europe's values must not give in to the unease caused by the terror propagated by individual fanatics in the media.

c2245d94a8.text: Die Insekten gehören zum Stamm der Gliederfüßer.
c2245d94a8.translation: The insects belong to the phylum of arthropods.

c224b9cda3.translation: The Little Bear contains the Polaris, which was used as a standard candle for star brightness, and it was only late that people realized it is a star with variable brightness.

c294045a49.text: Die Armeen der Römer schienen für viele Jahrzehnte für andere Völker unbesiegbar zu seien.
c294045a49.translation: The armies of the Romans seemed invincible to many peoples for decades.

While dead mailboxes are often used for the exchange of materials and information between agencies and their sources, the BND equipped an employee of the embassy with a cover story, and he now acted as a "living mailbox".

c296e80a78.translation: Apprentices are ranked below journeymen in the hierarchy of a craft business.

c296f7bb7c.text: Mit dem Erdbeben kam dann auch noch das Problem mit den Kraftwerken.
c296f7bb7c.translation: With the earthquake came the problem with the power plants as well.

c2979b3db7.text: „Im Verlauf eines Digitalgesprächs ist dies nicht so.“
c2979b3db7.translation: In the course of a digital conversation, this is not the case.

c298137524.text: „Brunei gab 2013 rund 402 Millionen US-Dollar für sein Militär aus.“
c298137524.translation: In 2013, Brunei spent around 402 million US dollars on its military.

c298f4b0a9.text: „Schneeflocken strömen den Scheinwerfern entgegen, platzen auf dem Glas der Windschutzscheibe.“
c298f4b0a9.translation: Snowflakes flow towards the headlights, bursting on the glass of the windshield.

c29ab93b6f.text: Kleine Jungs verkleiden sich zu Fasching gern als Pirat.
c29ab93b6f.translation: Little boys like to dress up as pirates for carnival.

c29addb965.text: „Viel später, ich hatte die Zeichnungen längst vergessen, habe ich ein gleiches, über fünfundachtzig Jahre altes Lehrbuch schmunzelnd auf eBay wiedergefunden und war gerührt.“
c29addb965.translation: Much later, I had long forgotten the drawings, but I found a similar, over eighty-five years old textbook again on eBay with a smile and was touched.

c29ae1376c.text: Wann tritt das neue Gesetz in Kraft?
c29ae1376c.translation: When does the new law come into force?

c29c1839d7.translation: There are also different categories of male prostitutes, with some young men able to switch from one to another: from "street workers" at train stations, on the street, or in "escort clubs" to expensive "call boys" and "male escorts," who work independently or for an agency.

c29cecd03c.translation: To protect myself from new hypothermia, I receive a pure white silk scarf, a masterpiece of its kind, which once belonged to a tailcoat.

c29eba56b7.translation: Finally, he drew his dagger and reached for her.

c2a08a6dea.text: Das ist ein sehr gehorsames Kind, es widerspricht nicht ständig.
c2a08a6dea.translation: That is a very obedient child; it does not argue constantly.

c2a0cd6186.text: „Die Staatsanwälte halten es aber auch für möglich, dass die kriminellen Schnüffler ihre Kontakte in der Telekom nur ausgenutzt und auf eigene Rechnung gearbeitet haben.“
c2a0cd6186.translation: However, the prosecutors also consider it possible that the criminal snoopers only exploited their contacts in the Telekom and worked on their own account.

c2a0d9ebf1.text: Es gibt Situationen im Leben, wo man lieber Blumen sprechen lässt.
c2a0d9ebf1.translation: There are situations in life where people prefer to let flowers speak.

c2a174093f.text: „Der Mann nahm ein Taschentuch aus einer Hosentasche und trocknete die Tränen, und dann kam er auf mich zu und wollte auch mich sofort umarmen.“
c2a174093f.translation: The man took a tissue out of a pocket and dried his tears, then he came up to me and wanted to hug me immediately.

c2a1d6253f.text: Es handelt sich hierbei um ein nationales Kulturgut.
c2a1d6253f.translation: This is a national cultural asset.

c2a2351cad.text: „Linus war in der ganzen Schule bekannt, denn egal, was man zu ihm sagte, er antwortete immer mit «Alles gut!» Bei ihm war immer «Alles gut».“
c2a2351cad.translation: Linus was well-known throughout the school because no matter what you said to him, he always replied "All is good!" With him, it's always "All is good."

c2a4302047.text: Der sogenannte Naturschutz schützt meistens ein Artefakt, nämlich die vom Menschen geschaffene Kulturlandschaft.
c2a4302047.translation: The so-called nature conservation usually protects an artifact, namely the cultural landscape created by humans.

c2a4ec2895.text: „Unabhängig von meinem Versagen als Rassist war mir klar, daß ich im Süden nicht willkommen war.“
c2a4ec2895.translation: Regardless of my failure as a racist, I was clear that I was not welcome in the south.

c2abce9c38.text: „Die 44-jährige zierliche Frau ist eine von nur vier Aalfischerinnen auf dem Lough Neagh.“
c2abce9c38.translation: The 44-year-old petite woman is one of only four female eel fishers on Lough Neagh.

c2ad6ae737.text: Welches Geld könnte dir denn dabei durch die Lappen gehen?
c2ad6ae737.translation: What money could possibly slip through your fingers?

c2b279d805.translation: Many audience members dressed up for the evening with their idol in pink, draped a pink flower on their head, or tied a princess tiara into their hair.

c2b4c7b50d.translation: The same applies to 'afternoon' or 'saucer', which are also called prepositional valency compounds.

c2b5372c3f.translation: The steam train comes rushing up. The horse of an oncoming general makes a mighty leap to the side, without the stern face of the white-haired military officer changing in any way.

c2b5c874b6.translation: The real culprit had to be discovered and punished, and the Indian woman avenged, then he wanted to leave a land where only sorrow and pain could flourish for him from then on.

c2b667d475.translation: He was, as he confided in me, horrified at the thought that I had hired a person of color as my secretary.

c2b7fd0add.translation: Flying damages the climate not only because of the direct CO₂ emissions from the combustion of kerosene, but also because aircraft leave contrails in the sky that act as potent greenhouse gases.

c2bbc00d2c.translation: Rule number one of Fight Club is: you don't talk about it.

c2be79f336.translation: This convention promotes an overview of the sources and viewpoints.

c2bf50abe1.translation: In the past, Lada was considered an affordable alternative to expensive brands. Today, Ladas are no longer like their predecessor, the Shiguli.

c2c44d87fc.translation: One of the next afternoons, Robert decided to take a walk through the city.

c2c7b1a058.translation: Every Wednesday, running enthusiasts of the RC/8K (Running Club / 8 kilometers) meet in Zurich's city center for an 8-kilometer run.

c2fbb8d043.text_linked: [Kartäuserschnecke:] „Die [[Tiere|nouns/Tier#1]] [[leben|verbs/leben#1]] von vermodernden [[Gräsern|nouns/Gras#1]] wie Rohr-Schwingel (Festuca arundinacea), aber auch [[Mittlerem|adjectives/mittel]] Wegerich (Plantago media).“

c2fcd7da3c.text: „Drei directe Abgaben beſtehen: die Taille, die Kopfſteuer und der Zwanzigſte. — Ich unterbreche aber hier für eine Weile den Gang der Denkſchrift, um zu bemerken, daß die Taille die einzige Steuer war, welche erhöht werden konnte, ohne einer Einzeichnung von Seiten der Parlamente zu bedürfen.“
c2fcd7da3c.translation: There are three direct taxes: the tax on the waist, the head tax, and the twentieth. — But I will pause here for a while to note that the waist was the only tax that could be increased without needing approval from the parliaments.
c2fcd7da3c.text_linked: „Drei directe Abgaben beſtehen: [[die|determiners/die]] [[Taille|nouns/Taille#1]], die Kopfſteuer [[und|conjunctions/und]] [[der|determiners/der]] Zwanzigſte. — Ich [[unterbreche|verbs/unterbrechen#3]] [[aber|particles/aber]] [[hier|adverbs/hier]] [[für|prepositions/für]] [[eine|determiners/eine]] [[Weile|nouns/Weile]] [[den|determiners/der]] [[Gang|nouns/Gang_art]] der Denkſchrift, [[um|prepositions/um]] [[zu|particles/zu_drückt]] [[bemerken|verbs/bemerken#1]], [[daß|conjunctions/dass]] die Taille die [[einzige|adjectives/einzig#4]] [[Steuer|nouns/Steuer_nicht#1]] [[war|verbs/sein]], [[welche|pronouns/welche_indefinitpronomen#2]] [[erhöht|verbs/erhöhen]] [[werden|verbs/werden#2]] [[konnte|verbs/können_etwas]], [[ohne|prepositions/ohne]] [[einer|determiners/ein]] Einzeichnung [[von|prepositions/von]] [[Seiten|nouns/Seite#6]] der [[Parlamente|nouns/Parlament]] zu bedürfen.“

c2fcda0dde.text: „Während im Westen Europa's in älterer Zeit das Heerdenvieh (pecus daher pecunia) später Nutzmetalle, wie Kupfer und Eisen, als Tauschmittel dienten, war man in der Levante schon längst dazu geschritten, das gewogene Silber oder Gold zum Werthmesser zu erheben, denn schon Abraham kaufte um 400 Schekel (= Gewogenes) Silber einen Begräbnisplatz.“
c2fcda0dde.translation: While in the West of Europe in earlier times livestock (pecus, hence pecunia) and later useful metals such as copper and iron served as means of exchange, in the Levant they had long since proceeded to elevate weighed silver or gold to the status of measure of value, for already Abraham bought a burial place for 400 shekels (= weighed [silver]) of silver.

c2fd59b0f9.text: „Am Wochenende gestand Mark Garnier, ein Juniorminister im Handelsministerium, er habe seine Sekretärin nach einem Weihnachtsessen gedrängt, in einem Laden in Soho ein Sexspielzeug zu kaufen.“
c2fd59b0f9.translation: Over the weekend, Mark Garnier, a junior minister in the Department of Trade, confessed that he pressured his secretary to buy sex toys in a store in Soho after a Christmas dinner.
c2fd59b0f9.text_linked: „Am Wochenende [[gestand|verbs/gestand#1]] Mark Garnier, [[ein|determiners/ein]] Juniorminister im Handelsministerium, er [[habe|verbs/haben#1]] [[seine|pronouns/sein]] [[Sekretärin|nouns/Sekretärin#1]] [[nach|prepositions/nach#1]] [[einem|determiners/ein]] Weihnachtsessen [[gedrängt|verbs/drängen]], [[in|prepositions/in]] einem [[Laden|nouns/Laden_geschäft#1]] in Soho ein Sexspielzeug [[zu|prepositions/zu]] [[kaufen|verbs/kaufen#1]].“

c2fe159a68.text: „Aufgrund des hohen Bedarfs fand auch ein Handel mit Blei über weite Strecken statt, der sich unter anderem durch Inschriften auf römischen Bleibarren nachweisen lässt.“
c2fe159a68.translation: Due to the high demand, there was also a trade in lead over long distances, which can be demonstrated among other things by inscriptions on Roman lead bars.
c2fe159a68.text_linked: „[[Aufgrund|adverbs/aufgrund]] [[des|pronouns/der_nominativ]] [[hohen|adjectives/hoch#1]] [[Bedarfs|nouns/Bedarf]] [[fand|verbs/finden#5]] [[auch|adverbs/auch]] [[ein|determiners/ein]] [[Handel|nouns/Handel#1]] [[mit|prepositions/mit#1]] [[Blei|nouns/Blei_silbernes#1]] [[über|prepositions/über#2]] [[weite|adjectives/weit]] [[Strecken|nouns/Strecke]] statt, der sich unter anderem [[durch|prepositions/durch#1]] [[Inschriften|nouns/Inschrift#1]] [[auf|prepositions/auf#1]] römischen Bleibarren [[nachweisen|verbs/nachweisen#2]] lässt.“
